languages.text: "В таком случае нам более не о чем говорить". {n}Задетая вашим отказом, наследница уходит прочь.{/n}
"Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}
languages.original_text: "В таком случае нам более не о чем говорить". {n}Задетая вашим отказом, наследница уходит прочь.{/n}

"Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}

languages.text: «Entonces no tenemos nada de lo que hablar». {n}Ofendida por tu rechazo, Juvenna se marcha.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Entonces no tenemos nada de lo que hablar». {n}Ofendida por tu rechazo, Juvenna se marcha.{/n}

languages.text: “那我们也没什么好谈的了。”{n}尤文娜因你的拒绝而恼怒，转身走开了。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “那我们也没什么好谈的了。”{n}尤文娜因你的拒绝而恼怒，转身走开了。{/n}

languages.text: « Dans ce cas, nous n'avons plus rien à nous dire. » {n}Offensée par votre refus, Juvenna s'éloigne à grands pas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Dans ce cas, nous n'avons plus rien à nous dire. » {n}Offensée par votre refus, Juvenna s'éloigne à grands pas.{/n}

languages.text: "Öyleyse konuşacak başka bir şeyimiz yok." {n}Reddedilmekten alınan Juvenna uzaklaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Öyleyse konuşacak başka bir şeyimiz yok." {n}Reddedilmekten alınan Juvenna uzaklaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Dann gibt es nichts mehr zu besprechen." {n}Angesichts deiner Weigerung beleidigt, zieht Juvenna von dannen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Then we have nothing further to discuss." {n}Affronted by your refusal, Juvenna walks away.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Dann gibt es nichts mehr zu besprechen." {n}Angesichts deiner Weigerung beleidigt, zieht Juvenna von dannen.{/n}

languages.text: 「それでは、私たちには他に話すことはありませんね。」{n}ユベナはあなたの拒絶に腹を立てて去っていった.{/n}
